channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A guide to identifying common bugs and their bites
2 Minute Medicine Rewind July 20, 2026
item.description: Advanced home medical care for acute heart failure patients shows promise after hospitalization for decompensated HF.

item.title: What Is Cyclosporiasis? The Parasite Behind the Latest Outbreak
item.description: Health officials investigate a multistate outbreak of this parasitic intestinal infection; learn its causes, spread, and symptoms.

item.title: 2MM: AI Roundup: Food and Drug Administration reviews liver injury prediction tool, Joint Commission launches healthcare artificial intelligence certification, governance playbooks aim to standardize adoption, and pediatric hospitals bring generative tools to the frontline
item.description: NHS England rolls out Microsoft Copilot to 505,000 clinicians after a trial saved nearly an hour of admin time daily.
